problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
